name: Raksha Bandhan
description: Sisters tie rakhis on brothers' wrists. Heavy demand for premium sweets and chocolate gift packs.

name: Ganesh Chaturthi
description: 10-day festival honoring Ganesha. High demand for modak ingredients and pooja items.

name: Diwali
description: Festival of Lights. Massive gifting and home cooking demand across all categories.

name: Christmas & New Year
description: Year-end celebrations. High demand for party snacks, carbonated beverages, and baking supplies.

name: Holi
description: Festival of Colors. High demand for snacks, beverages, and traditional sweets ingredients.
